title: Ashbound
description: a hellish mod that allows you to transform into eldritch demons
body:
Dive into the depths of the Nether and harness its terrifying power with Ahsbound, a mod that transforms you into a monstrous force of destruction. Become the strongest being by harvesting the power of the nether itself using the following items:

Nether Core:
Crafted from the rarest Nether materials, the Nether Core pulses with raw, unstable energy. It serves as the catalyst for transformation, requiring a sacrifice of blaze rods, netherite scraps, and a ghast tear to forge. Once obtained, it hums with power, waiting to be channeled. it sustaines the nether totem and is used to craft and activate it to unleash the true power of the nether.

Nether Totem
When held in your offhand, the Nether Totem begins siphoning the Nether’s essence, growing hotter as it charges. Once fully empowered, activate it to undergo a horrifying metamorphosis—your skin cracks with molten veins, your eyes burn with hellfire, and demonic wings erupt from your back. you unleash the true power of the nether transforming you and giving you seemingly infinite power.
